concepts.title: Push to Talk AI Summary
concepts.summary: An AI Companion feature that generates structured summaries of push-to-talk phone calls, including time period, quick recap, next steps, and full summary sections. The summary is available post-call in call history logs and can be edited and emailed, making it both a real-time catch-up tool and a persistent reference.
key_points: Generates summaries with timed sections: Summary time period, Quick recap, Next steps, Full summary
Available both during the call (catch-up) and after the call via call history
Summaries can be edited by the user and emailed
Requires account-level enablement of Push to Talk AI summary and email report

concepts.title: Catch Me Up with AI Companion
concepts.summary: A feature that lets users request an AI-generated summary of an ongoing push-to-talk conversation from a selected point in time. The UI presents multiple time-based catch-up options, and the AI returns a structured summary that helps users quickly rejoin the conversation context.
key_points: Accessible via an AI Companion icon in the top-right of the call screen
Presents multiple time-based options for how far back to summarize
Returns structured output: time period, quick recap, next steps, full summary
Useful for users joining a push-to-talk channel mid-conversation

user_roles.title: Zoom Phone Push-to-Talk User
user_roles.summary: End users who participate in push-to-talk channels and can trigger AI summaries. They interact with the AI Companion icon during calls and access summaries afterward in call history. The experience is mobile-first, available on Android and iOS.
key_points: Uses push-to-talk on Zoom Phone mobile app
Can trigger AI summaries during or after push-to-talk calls
Can select audio source (Bluetooth, Speaker, Mute, Headphones) before triggering summary
Can edit and email generated summaries

user_roles.title: Account Admin
user_roles.summary: Responsible for enabling Push to Talk AI summary and the associated email report at the account level. The admin's configuration determines whether the AI Companion icon and summary features are available to end users.
key_points: Enables Push to Talk AI summary at account level
Enables Push to Talk AI summary email report
Must have a Zoom Workplace Pro, Business, or Enterprise account

task_flows.title: Generate AI Summary During a Push-to-Talk Call
task_flows.summary: A mobile-first flow where the user selects an audio source, taps the AI Companion icon, chooses a catch-up time option, and receives a structured summary. Designers should ensure the icon is easily discoverable in the call UI and the time options are clear and meaningful.
key_points: Step 1: Use push-to-talk on Zoom Phone
Step 2: Optionally select audio source (Bluetooth, Speaker, Mute, Headphones) from top-left
Step 3: Tap the AI Companion icon in the top-right corner
Step 4: Select a catch-up time option from the presented choices
AI Companion generates summary with time period, quick recap, next steps, and full summary

constraints.title: Account and Enablement Requirements
constraints.summary: The feature requires a Pro, Business, or Enterprise Zoom Workplace account and both the Push to Talk AI summary and email report settings enabled by an admin. Designers should plan for graceful degradation when prerequisites are not met, with clear messaging about missing requirements.
key_points: Requires Zoom Workplace Pro, Business, or Enterprise account
Push to Talk AI summary must be enabled at account level
Push to Talk AI summary email report must also be enabled
Requires Zoom mobile app for Android or iOS at minimum global version or higher
AI Companion may not be available for select verticals and regional customers

ux_patterns.title: AI Companion Icon in Call Toolbar
ux_patterns.summary: The AI Companion feature is exposed as a dedicated icon button in the top-right corner of the call screen. Tapping it opens a modal or screen with catch-up time options, following a pattern of contextual AI actions surfaced as toolbar icons during live calls.
key_points: Icon placed in top-right of the push-to-talk call screen
Single tap opens the catch-up options screen
Consistent with other AI Companion entry points across Zoom products

ux_patterns.title: Audio Source Selector in Call UI
ux_patterns.summary: A selector in the top-left corner of the call screen allowing users to choose between Bluetooth, Speaker, Mute, and Headphones. This follows a standard media control pattern and must be easily accessible during an active push-to-talk session.
key_points: Located in top-left corner of call screen
Options include Bluetooth, Speaker, Mute, and Headphones
Optional step — user can proceed without changing audio source

ux_patterns.title: Structured AI Summary Card
ux_patterns.summary: AI-generated summaries are presented with consistent sections: Summary time period, Quick recap, Next steps, and Full summary. This structured format helps users quickly scan and locate the information they need, and provides a predictable design pattern for AI-generated content in the product.
key_points: Consistent four-section structure for all AI summaries
Summary time period clarifies the temporal scope of the summary
Quick recap provides scannable overview
Next steps surfaces actionable items from the conversation
Full summary provides comprehensive detail
